name: LinkedIn Recruiter: Open Talent Home
description: Health-check / pre-flight: daemon opens /talent/home using the staged Recruiter session (.linkedin-profile) and asserts the seat is WARM. Read-only. The recruiter_hot_reload_probe step makes the daemon run assertNoBlocker, so a walled seat FAILS the run instead of silently completing on /uas/login-cap. Therefore `completed` == warm, `failed` == walled. (Prefer the free GET /v1/daemon/status seat_warm read; run this only when you need an active probe.)

steps.intent: Assert Recruiter seat is warm (fails if walled)
